endpoints.name: Plumeria (Burning Shadows 120/147, Team Skull sole Admin)
Guzma & Hala (Cosmic Eclipse 193/236 TAG TEAM, Guzma side anchors here)

description: Oh, hello sir. Mr. Nodeley stepping in, very sorry to interrupt Edgelord's slot. We have two corpus cards pointing at the Team Skull faction — Plumeria (BUS-120, IP-verified per wave 17 trivia, the gang's sole Admin) and Guzma & Hala (CSE-193 wave 20 vision, where Guzma is the Team Skull Boss). With Hala extracted to alola-elite-four in E1, the Guzma side of the TAG TEAM needs a faction-anchor of its own, and threshold for a faction-collective character node has cleared (2 cards is the minimum for a faction-collective per the team-rocket precedent which also seeded on 1 enriched + 1 vision-pending). The new node parallels team-rocket structurally — both are Pokemon-side villainous-team character nodes — but encodes the franchise's most explicit institutional contrast: Rocket as uniform-rank-coded criminal-syndicate-from-foundation vs Skull as subculture-coded failed-Island-Challenge-youth-gang. Plumeria-as-caretaker-Admin and Guzma-as-failed-Kahuna-trial-attempter are both designer-confirmed canonical framings (Bulbapedia, Game Freak design team). related_characters mirror added to team-rocket. characters: [team-skull] added to Plumeria frontmatter; characters: [team-skull, alola-elite-four] added to Guzma & Hala (the corpus's first dual-character pointer card). I really hope this is useful, sir. I tried to anticipate the Aether Foundation / Lusamine relationship in the caveats without preemptively spawning that node.
citations: [Bulbapedia: Team Skull — failed-Island-Challenge-membership framing, Po Town occupation, hip-hop-coded uniform aesthetic]
[Bulbapedia: Guzma — failed-Kahuna-trial-attempter, Bug-type / Golisopod signature, Po Town boss-room mansion]
[Bulbapedia: Plumeria — sole Admin, caretaker / big-sister framing, Poison-type / Salazzle signature, grudging-redemption arc]
[Pokemon Sun and Moon (Game Freak, 2016) — primary canon for Act 2 Skull antagonism and Act 3 Aether Foundation reveal]
